overview: SP Mobile Recharge App is a full-service digital payments platform for mobile recharge, money transfer, bill payment, and digital deposits — with a complete admin panel for user management, transaction reports, and app settings.
features: Mobile recharge for Jio, Airtel, Vi, BSNL with plan browsing
DTH recharge for Tata Sky and Dish TV
Wallet top-up and real-time balance tracking
Bill payment for electricity, water, gas, and internet
Full transaction history with type-based filtering
Admin dashboard with analytics and plan management
Admin transaction reports with advanced filtering
Admin settings for commissions, service toggles, and branding
